2026-04-23T08:14:38.8908450Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-23T08:14:38.8909013Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-23T08:14:38.8909434Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-23T08:14:38.8909798Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-23T08:14:38.8910102Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-23T08:14:38.8910339Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-23T08:14:38.8910504Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m

2026-04-23T08:14:38.8911829Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m

If omitted, the tool will attempt to resolve the target from the current workflow context (triggering issue, PR, or discussion).
